validated_commands.test_unit: uv run --extra dev pytest tests/unit -q --tb=short (note: PyPy 3.10 env; some tests fail due to env, not code)
validated_commands.lint_check: uv run --extra dev ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run --extra dev ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_fix: uv run --extra dev ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && uv run --extra dev ruff format src/ tests/

env_notes: PyPy 3.10 env -- many deps (yaml, click, pydantic-core) fail to build. CI uses CPython. Use pip install -e .[dev] + python3 -m pytest for isolated tests locally.

completed_prs.description: 37 unit tests for token_manager security-critical helpers
26 unit tests for update_policy module (build-time self-update policy)
15 unit tests for security/file_scanner module (scan_lockfile_packages orchestration)
